---
title: "pheast_thyroid"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## Loading In data set

```{r}
# Chunk 1: Check and extract files

getwd()

if (!dir.exists("GSE281736_RAW")) {
  stop("GSE281736_RAW folder not found. Move it into your R Studio folder.")
}

list.files(
  "GSE281736_RAW",
  recursive = TRUE
)
```

#### Filtering:

```{r}
# Chunk 1: Match GEO metadata to CAYA adjacent normal thyroid P files

library(GEOquery)
library(Seurat)
library(dplyr)
library(stringr)

gse <- getGEO(
  "GSE281736",
  GSEMatrix = TRUE
)

thyroid_pheno <- pData(gse[[1]])

# Keep only CAYA adjacent normal thyroid P samples
thyroid_CAYA_P_samples <- thyroid_pheno[
  thyroid_pheno$`tissue region:ch1` == "P" &
    grepl("CAYA", thyroid_pheno$title),
]

thyroid_CAYA_P_samples[
  ,
  c(
    "title",
    "geo_accession",
    "tissue region:ch1",
    "tissue:ch1"
  )
]

# These GSM accessions are the files to load
thyroid_keep_gsm <- thyroid_CAYA_P_samples$geo_accession

cat("CAYA P GSM samples to load:\n")
print(thyroid_keep_gsm)

cat("\nCAYA P sample titles:\n")
print(thyroid_CAYA_P_samples$title)
```

```{r}
# Chunk 2: Load CAYA adjacent normal thyroid P samples from MTX files

library(Seurat)
library(dplyr)
library(stringr)

raw_dir <- "GSE281736_RAW"

thyroid_list <- list()

for (gsm in thyroid_keep_gsm) {
  
  matrix_file <- list.files(
    raw_dir,
    pattern = paste0(gsm, ".*matrix\\.mtx\\.gz$"),
    full.names = TRUE
  )
  
  barcode_file <- list.files(
    raw_dir,
    pattern = paste0(gsm, ".*barcodes\\.tsv\\.gz$"),
    full.names = TRUE
  )
  
  gene_file <- list.files(
    raw_dir,
    pattern = paste0(gsm, ".*genes\\.tsv\\.gz$"),
    full.names = TRUE
  )
  
  if (
    length(matrix_file) == 0 |
    length(barcode_file) == 0 |
    length(gene_file) == 0
  ) {
    cat("Missing files for:", gsm, "\n")
    next
  }
  
  sample_title <- thyroid_CAYA_P_samples$title[
    thyroid_CAYA_P_samples$geo_accession == gsm
  ]
  
  cat("Loading:", gsm, sample_title, "\n")
  
  counts <- ReadMtx(
    mtx = matrix_file[1],
    cells = barcode_file[1],
    features = gene_file[1],
    feature.column = 2
  )
  
  thyroid_obj <- CreateSeuratObject(
    counts = counts,
    project = sample_title
  )
  
  thyroid_obj$sample_id <- sample_title
  thyroid_obj$geo_accession <- gsm
  thyroid_obj$donor_id <- sample_title
  thyroid_obj$tissue <- "thyroid"
  thyroid_obj$tissue_region <- "P"
  thyroid_obj$age_group <- "CAYA"
  thyroid_obj$group <- "CAYA adjacent normal thyroid"
  
  thyroid_list[[sample_title]] <- thyroid_obj
}

thyroid_seurat <- merge(
  thyroid_list[[1]],
  y = thyroid_list[-1]
)

thyroid_seurat

cat(
  "Cells loaded:",
  ncol(thyroid_seurat),
  "\n"
)

cat(
  "\nSamples loaded:\n"
)

print(
  table(thyroid_seurat$sample_id)
)

cat(
  "\nAge group:\n"
)

print(
  table(thyroid_seurat$age_group)
)

cat(
  "\nTissue region:\n"
)

print(
  table(thyroid_seurat$tissue_region)
)
```

```{r}
# Filter to adjacent normal thyroid P samples from CAYA donors only

thyroid_P_samples <- thyroid_pheno[
  thyroid_pheno$`tissue region:ch1` == "P",
]

thyroid_P_CAYA_samples <- thyroid_P_samples[
  grepl("CAYA", thyroid_P_samples$title),
]

cat("Adjacent normal thyroid P samples:\n")
print(thyroid_P_samples$title)

cat("\nCAYA adjacent normal thyroid P samples:\n")
print(thyroid_P_CAYA_samples$title)

cat("\nNumber of CAYA P samples:\n")
print(nrow(thyroid_P_CAYA_samples))
```

#### QC:

```{r}
# Chunk 3: QC for CAYA adjacent normal thyroid dataset

library(Seurat)
library(dplyr)

thyroid_seurat[["percent.mito"]] <- PercentageFeatureSet(
  thyroid_seurat,
  pattern = "^MT-"
)

thyroid_keep_cells <-
  thyroid_seurat$nFeature_RNA >= 200 &
  thyroid_seurat$nCount_RNA >= 500 &
  thyroid_seurat$percent.mito <= 20

thyroid_ped_normal_qc <- thyroid_seurat[
  ,
  thyroid_keep_cells
]

cat(
  "Cell count before QC:",
  ncol(thyroid_seurat),
  "\n"
)

cat(
  "Cell count after QC:",
  ncol(thyroid_ped_normal_qc),
  "\n"
)

cat(
  "Cells removed during QC:",
  ncol(thyroid_seurat) - ncol(thyroid_ped_normal_qc),
  "\n"
)

cat(
  "\nSamples after QC:\n"
)

print(
  table(thyroid_ped_normal_qc$sample_id)
)

cat(
  "\nNumber of CAYA P samples after QC:",
  length(unique(thyroid_ped_normal_qc$sample_id)),
  "\n"
)
```

#### Normalization:

```{r}
# Check if thyroid data are raw counts, then normalize

library(Seurat)

# Check available layers
cat("Current RNA layers:\n")
print(
  Layers(thyroid_ped_normal_qc[["RNA"]])
)

# Check raw count values from first layer
first_count_layer <- Layers(thyroid_ped_normal_qc[["RNA"]])[1]

cat("\nSummary of first count layer values:\n")
print(
  summary(
    GetAssayData(
      thyroid_ped_normal_qc,
      layer = first_count_layer
    )@x
  )
)

cat("\nInterpretation:\n")
cat("Only counts layers are present, so this dataset is raw counts only.\n")

# Normalize raw counts
thyroid_ped_normal_qc <- NormalizeData(
  thyroid_ped_normal_qc,
  normalization.method = "LogNormalize",
  scale.factor = 10000
)

cat("\nNormalization complete.\n")
cat("Normalization method: log1p(counts per 10k)\n")

# Check new layers
cat("\nRNA layers after normalization:\n")
print(
  Layers(thyroid_ped_normal_qc[["RNA"]])
)
```

#### Heatmaps: NO IN-DEPTH CELL TYPE LABELS IN THIS DATASET

#### Broad:

```{r}
# Broad Cell Type Heatmap
# CAYA adjacent normal thyroid
# Uses cell_type labels

library(Seurat)
library(Matrix)
library(dplyr)
library(ComplexHeatmap)
library(circlize)
library(grid)

genes_to_plot <- c("CD24", "SIGLEC10")

# Marker genes for thyroid cell-type labeling
thyroid_marker_genes <- c(
  genes_to_plot,
  "TG", "TPO", "SLC5A5", "TSHR", "EPCAM", "KRT8", "KRT18",
  "PECAM1", "VWF", "KDR", "CLDN5",
  "COL1A1", "COL1A2", "DCN", "LUM", "COL3A1",
  "LYZ", "LST1", "S100A8", "S100A9", "CD14", "FCGR3A",
  "CD3D", "CD3E", "TRAC",
  "MS4A1", "CD79A", "CD79B",
  "NKG7", "GNLY", "KLRD1"
)

thyroid_marker_genes <- unique(thyroid_marker_genes)

# Use normalized data layers
data_layers <- grep(
  "^data",
  Layers(thyroid_ped_normal_qc[["RNA"]]),
  value = TRUE
)

if (length(data_layers) == 0) {
  stop("No normalized data layers found. Run NormalizeData() first.")
}

expr_list <- lapply(
  data_layers,
  function(layer_name) {
    
    mat <- GetAssayData(
      thyroid_ped_normal_qc,
      layer = layer_name
    )
    
    out <- Matrix(
      0,
      nrow = length(thyroid_marker_genes),
      ncol = ncol(mat),
      sparse = TRUE
    )
    
    rownames(out) <- thyroid_marker_genes
    colnames(out) <- colnames(mat)
    
    present <- intersect(
      thyroid_marker_genes,
      rownames(mat)
    )
    
    if (length(present) > 0) {
      out[present, ] <- mat[present, , drop = FALSE]
    }
    
    out
  }
)

thyroid_expr_marker <- do.call(
  cbind,
  expr_list
)

thyroid_expr_marker <- as(
  thyroid_expr_marker,
  "dgCMatrix"
)

meta <- thyroid_ped_normal_qc@meta.data

meta <- meta[
  colnames(thyroid_expr_marker),
  ,
  drop = FALSE
]

marker_score <- function(genes) {
  
  present <- intersect(
    genes,
    rownames(thyroid_expr_marker)
  )
  
  if (length(present) == 0) {
    return(rep(0, ncol(thyroid_expr_marker)))
  }
  
  Matrix::colMeans(
    thyroid_expr_marker[present, , drop = FALSE]
  )
}

scores <- data.frame(
  Thyrocytes = marker_score(c("TG", "TPO", "SLC5A5", "TSHR", "EPCAM", "KRT8", "KRT18")),
  Endothelial_cells = marker_score(c("PECAM1", "VWF", "KDR", "CLDN5")),
  Fibroblasts = marker_score(c("COL1A1", "COL1A2", "DCN", "LUM", "COL3A1")),
  Myeloid_cells = marker_score(c("LYZ", "LST1", "S100A8", "S100A9", "CD14", "FCGR3A")),
  T_cells = marker_score(c("CD3D", "CD3E", "TRAC")),
  B_cells = marker_score(c("MS4A1", "CD79A", "CD79B")),
  NK_cells = marker_score(c("NKG7", "GNLY", "KLRD1")),
  check.names = FALSE
)

max_score <- apply(
  scores,
  1,
  max,
  na.rm = TRUE
)

cell_type <- colnames(scores)[
  max.col(scores, ties.method = "first")
]

cell_type[max_score < 0.05] <- "Other"
cell_type <- gsub("_", " ", cell_type)

meta$cell_type <- cell_type

expr_hm <- thyroid_expr_marker[
  genes_to_plot,
  ,
  drop = FALSE
]

keep_valid <- !is.na(meta$cell_type) &
              meta$cell_type != ""

meta <- meta[
  keep_valid,
  ,
  drop = FALSE
]

expr_hm <- expr_hm[
  ,
  keep_valid,
  drop = FALSE
]

cell_type_order <- c(
  "Thyrocytes",
  "Endothelial cells",
  "Fibroblasts",
  "Myeloid cells",
  "T cells",
  "B cells",
  "NK cells",
  "Other"
)

cell_types <- cell_type_order[
  cell_type_order %in% unique(meta$cell_type)
]

avg_mat <- sapply(
  cell_types,
  function(ct) {
    
    cols <- which(meta$cell_type == ct)
    
    Matrix::rowMeans(
      expr_hm[, cols, drop = FALSE]
    )
  }
)

avg_mat <- as.matrix(avg_mat)

heatmap_mat <- t(avg_mat)

label_df <- meta %>%
  group_by(cell_type) %>%
  summarise(
    d = n_distinct(donor_id),
    n = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

label_df <- label_df[
  match(rownames(heatmap_mat), label_df$cell_type),
]

rownames(heatmap_mat) <- paste0(
  label_df$cell_type,
  " (d=",
  label_df$d,
  ", n=",
  label_df$n,
  ")"
)

legend_max <- as.numeric(
  quantile(heatmap_mat, probs = 0.99, na.rm = TRUE)
)

col_fun <- colorRamp2(
  c(0, legend_max / 2, legend_max),
  c("#2166AC", "#D0D0D0", "#B2182B")
)

ht <- Heatmap(
  heatmap_mat,
  name = "Mean expression\nlog(CPM/100 + 1)",
  col = col_fun,
  cluster_rows = FALSE,
  cluster_columns = FALSE,
  rect_gp = gpar(col = "white", lwd = 1),
  row_names_side = "left",
  row_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 14, fontface = "bold"),
  row_names_max_width = unit(12, "cm"),
  column_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 16, fontface = "bold"),
  column_names_rot = 45,

  heatmap_legend_param = list(
    title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 14, fontface = "bold"),
    labels_gp = gpar(fontsize = 12)
  ),

  cell_fun = function(j, i, x, y, width, height, fill) {
    
    val <- heatmap_mat[i, j]
    lab <- if (val < 0.005) "0" else sprintf("%.4f", val)
    
    grid.text(
      lab,
      x,
      y,
      gp = gpar(fontsize = 10, col = "black")
    )
  }
)

grid.newpage()
draw(ht, heatmap_legend_side = "right")

png(
  "thyroid_CD24_SIGLEC10_broad_heatmap_presentation.png",
  width = 3000,
  height = 3200,
  res = 300
)

grid.newpage()
draw(ht, heatmap_legend_side = "right")
dev.off()
```

#### Horizontal:

```{r}
# Check if active identities have any labels

# Check active identity levels
levels(Idents(thyroid_seurat))

# Count identities
table(Idents(thyroid_seurat))

# Check if identities equal sample IDs
table(
  Idents(thyroid_seurat),
  thyroid_seurat$sample_id
)
```

```{r}

# Horizontal Long Heatmap
# CAYA adjacent normal thyroid
# Detailed marker-derived cell labels grouped by broad lineage

library(Seurat)
library(Matrix)
library(dplyr)
library(ComplexHeatmap)
library(circlize)
library(grid)

genes_to_plot <- c("CD24", "SIGLEC10")

# -------------------------
# Marker genes
# -------------------------

thyroid_marker_genes <- c(
  genes_to_plot,

  # Thyroid epithelial
  "TG", "TPO", "SLC5A5", "TSHR", "EPCAM", "KRT8", "KRT18",
  "MKI67", "TOP2A",

  # Stromal / vascular
  "PECAM1", "VWF", "KDR", "CLDN5",
  "COL1A1", "COL1A2", "DCN", "LUM", "COL3A1",
  "ACTA2", "TAGLN", "RGS5", "PDGFRB",

  # Myeloid / dendritic
  "LYZ", "LST1", "S100A8", "S100A9", "CD14", "FCGR3A",
  "C1QA", "C1QB", "C1QC",
  "FCER1A", "CLEC10A", "IL3RA", "CLEC4C",

  # T / NK
  "CD3D", "CD3E", "TRAC",
  "CD4", "IL7R",
  "CD8A", "CD8B",
  "FOXP3", "IL2RA", "CTLA4",
  "NKG7", "GNLY", "KLRD1", "PRF1",

  # B / plasma
  "MS4A1", "CD79A", "CD79B", "CD74", "TCL1A", "IGHD",
  "MZB1", "XBP1", "JCHAIN", "IGKC"
)

thyroid_marker_genes <- unique(thyroid_marker_genes)

# -------------------------
# Pull normalized data layers
# -------------------------

data_layers <- grep(
  "^data",
  Layers(thyroid_ped_normal_qc[["RNA"]]),
  value = TRUE
)

if (length(data_layers) == 0) {
  stop("No normalized data layers found. Run NormalizeData() first.")
}

expr_list <- lapply(
  data_layers,
  function(layer_name) {

    mat <- GetAssayData(
      thyroid_ped_normal_qc,
      layer = layer_name
    )

    out <- Matrix(
      0,
      nrow = length(thyroid_marker_genes),
      ncol = ncol(mat),
      sparse = TRUE
    )

    rownames(out) <- thyroid_marker_genes
    colnames(out) <- colnames(mat)

    present <- intersect(
      thyroid_marker_genes,
      rownames(mat)
    )

    if (length(present) > 0) {
      out[present, ] <- mat[present, , drop = FALSE]
    }

    out
  }
)

thyroid_expr_marker <- do.call(
  cbind,
  expr_list
)

thyroid_expr_marker <- as(
  thyroid_expr_marker,
  "dgCMatrix"
)

# -------------------------
# Metadata
# -------------------------

thyroid_heatmap_meta <- thyroid_ped_normal_qc@meta.data

thyroid_heatmap_meta <- thyroid_heatmap_meta[
  colnames(thyroid_expr_marker),
  ,
  drop = FALSE
]

# -------------------------
# Marker scoring
# -------------------------

marker_score <- function(genes) {

  present <- intersect(
    genes,
    rownames(thyroid_expr_marker)
  )

  if (length(present) == 0) {
    return(rep(0, ncol(thyroid_expr_marker)))
  }

  Matrix::colMeans(
    thyroid_expr_marker[present, , drop = FALSE]
  )
}

scores <- data.frame(
  Thyrocytes = marker_score(c(
    "TG", "TPO", "SLC5A5", "TSHR", "EPCAM", "KRT8", "KRT18"
  )),

  Proliferating_thyrocytes = marker_score(c(
    "MKI67", "TOP2A", "EPCAM", "KRT8", "KRT18"
  )),

  Endothelial_cells = marker_score(c(
    "PECAM1", "VWF", "KDR", "CLDN5"
  )),

  Fibroblasts = marker_score(c(
    "COL1A1", "COL1A2", "DCN", "LUM", "COL3A1"
  )),

  Pericytes_smooth_muscle = marker_score(c(
    "ACTA2", "TAGLN", "RGS5", "PDGFRB"
  )),

  Monocytes = marker_score(c(
    "LYZ", "LST1", "S100A8", "S100A9", "CD14"
  )),

  Macrophages = marker_score(c(
    "C1QA", "C1QB", "C1QC", "LYZ"
  )),

  Dendritic_cells = marker_score(c(
    "FCER1A", "CLEC10A"
  )),

  Plasmacytoid_dendritic_cells = marker_score(c(
    "IL3RA", "CLEC4C"
  )),

  CD4_T_cells = marker_score(c(
    "CD3D", "CD3E", "TRAC", "CD4", "IL7R"
  )),

  CD8_T_cells = marker_score(c(
    "CD3D", "CD3E", "TRAC", "CD8A", "CD8B"
  )),

  Regulatory_T_cells = marker_score(c(
    "FOXP3", "IL2RA", "CTLA4", "CD3D"
  )),

  NK_cells = marker_score(c(
    "NKG7", "GNLY", "KLRD1", "PRF1"
  )),

  Naive_B_cells = marker_score(c(
    "MS4A1", "CD79A", "CD79B", "CD74", "TCL1A", "IGHD"
  )),

  Plasma_cells = marker_score(c(
    "MZB1", "XBP1", "JCHAIN", "IGKC"
  )),

  check.names = FALSE
)

max_score <- apply(
  scores,
  1,
  max,
  na.rm = TRUE
)

thyroid_cell_type <- colnames(scores)[
  max.col(scores, ties.method = "first")
]

thyroid_cell_type[
  max_score < 0.05
] <- "Other"

thyroid_cell_type <- gsub(
  "_",
  " ",
  thyroid_cell_type
)

thyroid_heatmap_meta$cell_type <- thyroid_cell_type

cat("Detailed thyroid cell type counts:\n")
print(
  sort(
    table(thyroid_heatmap_meta$cell_type),
    decreasing = TRUE
  )
)

# -------------------------
# CD24 / SIGLEC10 expression
# -------------------------

expr_hm <- thyroid_expr_marker[
  genes_to_plot,
  ,
  drop = FALSE
]

keep_valid <- !is.na(thyroid_heatmap_meta$cell_type) &
              thyroid_heatmap_meta$cell_type != ""

thyroid_heatmap_meta <- thyroid_heatmap_meta[
  keep_valid,
  ,
  drop = FALSE
]

expr_hm <- expr_hm[
  ,
  keep_valid,
  drop = FALSE
]

# -------------------------
# Group detailed cell labels like blood heatmap
# -------------------------

cell_types <- unique(
  thyroid_heatmap_meta$cell_type
)

cell_type_info <- data.frame(
  cell_type = cell_types,
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

cell_type_info$cell_group <- case_when(
  grepl(
    "Thyrocyte",
    cell_type_info$cell_type,
    ignore.case = TRUE
  ) ~ "Thyroid epithelial",

  grepl(
    "Endothelial|Fibroblast|Pericyte|smooth muscle",
    cell_type_info$cell_type,
    ignore.case = TRUE
  ) ~ "Stromal / vascular",

  grepl(
    "Monocyte|Macrophage|Dendritic",
    cell_type_info$cell_type,
    ignore.case = TRUE
  ) ~ "Myeloid / dendritic",

  grepl(
    "CD4|CD8|Regulatory T",
    cell_type_info$cell_type,
    ignore.case = TRUE
  ) ~ "T cells",

  grepl(
    "NK",
    cell_type_info$cell_type,
    ignore.case = TRUE
  ) ~ "NK cells",

  grepl(
    "B cell|Plasma",
    cell_type_info$cell_type,
    ignore.case = TRUE
  ) ~ "B lineage",

  TRUE ~ "Other"
)

group_order <- c(
  "Thyroid epithelial",
  "Stromal / vascular",
  "Myeloid / dendritic",
  "T cells",
  "NK cells",
  "B lineage",
  "Other"
)

cell_type_info$cell_group <- factor(
  cell_type_info$cell_group,
  levels = group_order
)

cell_type_info <- cell_type_info %>%
  arrange(
    cell_group,
    cell_type
  )

cell_types_ordered <- cell_type_info$cell_type

# -------------------------
# Average expression by ordered cell types
# -------------------------

avg_mat <- sapply(
  cell_types_ordered,
  function(ct) {

    cols <- which(
      thyroid_heatmap_meta$cell_type == ct
    )

    Matrix::rowMeans(
      expr_hm[
        ,
        cols,
        drop = FALSE
      ]
    )
  }
)

avg_mat <- as.matrix(avg_mat)

label_df <- thyroid_heatmap_meta %>%
  group_by(cell_type) %>%
  summarise(
    d = n_distinct(donor_id),
    n = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

label_df <- label_df[
  match(
    cell_types_ordered,
    label_df$cell_type
  ),
]

colnames(avg_mat) <- paste0(
  label_df$cell_type,
  " (d=",
  label_df$d,
  ", n=",
  label_df$n,
  ")"
)

# -------------------------
# Color scale
# -------------------------

legend_max <- as.numeric(
  quantile(
    avg_mat,
    probs = 0.99,
    na.rm = TRUE
  )
)

col_fun <- colorRamp2(
  c(
    0,
    legend_max / 2,
    legend_max
  ),
  c(
    "#2166AC",
    "#D0D0D0",
    "#B2182B"
  )
)

# -------------------------
# Heatmap
# -------------------------

ht <- Heatmap(
  avg_mat,

  name = "Mean expression\nlog1p(counts per 10k)",

  col = col_fun,

  cluster_rows = FALSE,
  cluster_columns = FALSE,

  column_split = cell_type_info$cell_group,

  rect_gp = gpar(
    col = "white",
    lwd = 1
  ),

  row_names_gp = gpar(
    fontsize = 12,
    fontface = "bold"
  ),

  column_names_side = "bottom",
  column_names_rot = 90,

  column_names_gp = gpar(
    fontsize = 7
  ),

  width = unit(
    42,
    "cm"
  ),

  height = unit(
    5,
    "cm"
  ),

  cell_fun = function(j, i, x, y, width, height, fill) {

    val <- avg_mat[i, j]

    lab <- if (val < 0.005) {
      "0"
    } else {
      sprintf("%.3f", val)
    }

    grid.text(
      lab,
      x,
      y,
      gp = gpar(
        fontsize = 6,
        col = "black"
      )
    )
  }
)

grid.newpage()

draw(
  ht,
  heatmap_legend_side = "right"
)

png(
  "thyroid_CD24_SIGLEC10_horizontal_detailed_grouped_heatmap.png",
  width = 4600,
  height = 1800,
  res = 220
)

grid.newpage()

draw(
  ht,
  heatmap_legend_side = "right"
)

dev.off()
```

```         
```
